---
title: Cancer Types
listing:
  contents: "*.md"
  type: table
  fields: [name, oncotree_code, main_type, parent]
  field-display-names:
    name: "Name"
    oncotree_code: "OncoTree code"
    main_type: "Main type"
    parent: "Parent"
  field-links: [name]
  sort: "name asc"
  filter-ui: true
  sort-ui: true
  page-size: 100
---
